headline: Explore the top gainers and losers within the S&P500 index in today's session.

headline: Gen Digital Bets On AI Browser Security To Support Norton Ecosystem
summary: Norton, part of Gen Digital, has rolled out a major update to its AI native browser, Norton Neo, with new integrated privacy and security features. The release introduces proactive phishing defense, AI prompt injection protection, adaptive VPN, and early access to a new agentic AI assistant. These changes follow recent additions of VPN for Agents and expanded AI agent protection within Norton 360, targeting risks tied to autonomous AI tools.
